meta.title: Malpractice Accountability
sources: CMS National Plan and Provider Enumeration System (NPPES)
NY OPMC Board Actions (Health Data NY)

top_findings: 2,873 federally excluded physicians still maintain active National Provider Identifier (NPI) records
147 physicians convicted of patient abuse or neglect have active NPI records
203 convicted of felony healthcare fraud maintain active provider identifiers
723 excluded physicians (25%) migrated to a different state after exclusion
